worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "table-management",
  "name": "Table Management Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Masa yönetimi - masa planı, oturma düzeni ve kapasite yönetimi",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "operations",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization"],
    "optional": ["order", "qr-code", "reservation"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["ITableService", "IFloorPlanService"],
    "events": [
      "table.created",
      "table.updated",
      "table.status_changed",
      "table.occupied",
      "table.available",
      "floor_plan.updated"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "table:view",
      "table:create",
      "table:update",
      "table:delete",
      "table:manage_status",
      "floor_plan:edit"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "starter",
    "features": {
      "starter": ["basic_tables", "status_tracking"],
      "professional": ["basic_tables", "status_tracking", "floor_plan", "sections"],
      "business": ["basic_tables", "status_tracking", "floor_plan", "sections", "multiple_areas", "capacity_planning"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_tables", "status_tracking", "floor_plan", "sections", "multiple_areas", "capacity_planning", "real_time_tracking", "analytics"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Table CRUD management",
    "Visual floor plan editor",
    "Real-time status tracking",
    "Section/area management",
    "Capacity planning",
    "QR code per table",
    "Table merging/splitting",
    "Waitlist integration",
    "Turnover analytics"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q2 2026"
}
